user_prompt: Write a cover letter for Notion that mentions their writing culture and references my docs work at my last job.
actual_output:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I’m excited to apply to Notion because of the way you’ve built a product that treats writing not just as a task, but as a core part of how teams think, collaborate, and create clarity. That emphasis on thoughtful communication and strong writing culture really stands out to me, and it’s one of the reasons I’m drawn to the opportunity.

In my last role, I worked extensively on docs and documentation work, where I helped turn complex information into clear, usable resources for internal teams and external users. I enjoyed the challenge of structuring content so it was easy to navigate, consistent in voice, and actually useful in practice. That experience strengthened my ability to write with precision, adapt to different audiences, and improve how teams share knowledge.

What excites me most about Notion is the combination of product craftsmanship and cultural alignment around writing, organization, and clarity. I’d love the opportunity to contribute to a team that values those same principles and helps people do their best work through better tools.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I’d welcome the chance to discuss how my docs experience and writing-focused approach could contribute to Notion.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the user's instructions perfectly, generating a cover letter for Notion that specifically mentioned their writing culture and the user's previous documentation work.
